labels.name: needs-spec
labels.description: Issue needs a spec — triggers claude-spec.yml

labels.name: ready
labels.description: Spec complete, no open questions — ready to implement

labels.name: open-questions
labels.description: Spec raised open questions — answer inline, then apply jules

labels.name: jules
labels.description: Hand off to the Jules coding agent for a draft PR

labels.name: exploratory
labels.description: Exploratory / not-yet-committed feature or change; needs playtesting before adoption

labels.name: regression
labels.description: Worked in a previous release, now broken

labels.name: blocked
labels.description: Blocked on an upstream fix or another issue
